# XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.medium

**Case**

Medium image quality, represented as a high quality lossy JPEG image.

## Declaration

```swift
case medium
```

## Quality Settings

- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.original**: Original image quality, represented as a lossless PNG image.
- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.low**: Low image quality, represented as a highly compressed lossy JPEG image.
